\tzpentry{ID5818}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5818 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{K}(t,t') = \exp[-(t-t')/\tau_{\text{decoherence}}]$
\]
